# Executable Contract

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/storedistributiondocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Daemon Changes](../daemon-changes.md)

The local preflight contract lives at [`../../../packaging/store/riido_daemon_store_distribution.riido.json`](../../../packaging/store/riido_daemon_store_distribution.riido.json).

Run the executable contract locally with:

```bash
go run ./tools/storecontract -contract packaging/store/riido_daemon_store_distribution.riido.json -repo .
```

The contract validates:

- provider CLI bundling is explicitly forbidden
- required SSOT documents exist
- required store channels are declared
- store artifact roots do not contain files named like provider executables
- store artifact roots do not contain hardcoded developer user paths

Channel runtime fields:

- `developer-id`: `local-helper-broker`, `explicit-consent`, `unix-socket`, `user-application-support`, `self-managed`
- `mac-app-store`: `sandboxed-login-item-helper`, `explicit-consent-and-store-review`, `unix-socket`, `app-group-or-sandbox-container`, `app-store-managed`
- `msix-sideload`: `msix-packaged-helper-broker`, `explicit-consent`, `windows-named-pipe`, `windows-package-local-data`, `self-managed`
- `msix-store`: `msix-packaged-full-trust-helper-tray`, `explicit-consent-and-store-review`, `windows-named-pipe`, `windows-package-local-data`, `store-managed`
